response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, leadership, and mentoring, with notable achievements in cloud infrastructure, distributed systems, and technical workshops. However, his background is heavily skewed towards web and mobile development with TypeScript, JavaScript, and Node.js, with limited evidence of deep expertise in C++ (only brief mention in C/C++ work for National Instruments) or large-scale cloud compute infrastructure. His leadership roles are present but not explicitly in cloud/DevOps domains, and his cloud architecture experience is not clearly demonstrated.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship and mentoring skills with a focus on testable, maintainable code
Proven ability to lead technical projects and contribute to open-source platforms with scalable architectures
Demonstrated technical leadership in multiple roles, including founding a Geo-Data platform used by NGOs
concerns: Limited direct experience with C++ (8 years required), with only brief involvement in a C/C++ IDE context
Minimal evidence of large-scale cloud compute infrastructure experience or production-level cloud architecture
Lack of clear alignment with the core technologies (C++, cloud compute) and responsibilities (technical strategy for cloud compute platform) of the role

key_factors.factor: Leadership and mentoring in cloud/DevOps domain
